title: Language update notifications
scenario: Verify language update notifications appear when the app is in the background during a device software update.
steps: Select one of the supported languages (a popup window should appear).
Click 'Update now' — the 'Software update: Three easy steps' screen should show with animation.
When the update starts, put the application in the background.
expected: A notification showing "device update in progress" should appear. Upon successful update, a notification that the device is updated should be seen.
